description_long: This street light features a tall, slender, vertically ribbed pole with a hexagonal base and a classic lantern-style lamp head. The lamp head is topped with a pointed, conical cap and has four slightly tapered glass panels framed in dark metal. The pole itself is decorated with subtle vertical grooves, giving it a traditional and elegant appearance. The lamp head is directly attached to the top of the pole without any horizontal arms. The overall color scheme is a combination of matte black or dark gray metal and frosted or clear glass. This design is commonly found in historic urban districts, parks, or along pedestrian walkways.
description: A tall, ribbed street light with a classic lantern-style lamp head and a pointed cap, finished in dark metal and glass.
description_view_0: Front view showing the lantern-style lamp head with its pointed cap and the vertically ribbed pole.
description_view_1: Side view, nearly identical to the front, highlighting the lamp head's symmetrical design and the pole's ribbing.
description_view_2: Rear view, mirroring the front, with the lamp head and pole details clearly visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to the other sides, showing the consistent ribbed pole and lantern head.
attribute_lamp_head_design: Classic lantern-style with a pointed conical cap, four glass panels, and dark metal framing; no visible decorative scrollwork or diffusers.
attribute_pole_ornamentation: Vertically ribbed with subtle grooves; no elaborate ornamentation.
